meta.siteDesc: Your independent insurance broker in Switzerland. Personal, transparent, and free-of-charge advice.

home.heroSub: We compare independently on your behalf and find the best solution – free of charge and personal.
home.servicesSub: Three areas, one goal: your optimal insurance coverage.
home.healthDesc: Basic and supplementary insurance compared. We find the plan that fits your needs.
home.pensionDesc: Pillar 3a, Pillar 3b, life insurance, and more. We plan your financial future.
home.propertyDesc: Auto, household, liability, and legal protection. Comprehensive everyday coverage.
home.howSub: Three steps to your optimal insurance solution.
home.step1Desc: We analyze your current situation together and clarify your needs.
home.step2Desc: We compare offers from various providers and present the best solution for you.
home.step3Desc: We handle the switch and remain at your side whenever you need us.
home.whySub: We stand for independent advice, transparency, and personal service.
home.why1Desc: We are not tied to any insurance company and advise exclusively in your interest.
home.why2Desc: Our advice is completely free for you. We are compensated by the insurers.
home.why3Desc: No call center, no hold queues. You always have a dedicated contact person.
home.why4Desc: Open communication about premiums, benefits, and our compensation in accordance with ISA Art. 45.
home.ctaBannerDesc: Contact us for a free and non-binding initial consultation. Together, we will find the optimal solution for your insurance needs.

health.heroTitle: The right health insurance for you
health.heroSub: Compare premiums, understand benefits, and make the best choice with professional guidance.
health.intro: Health insurance is mandatory in Switzerland. However, premiums and benefits differ significantly between providers. We help you keep track and find the optimal insurance solution.
health.why1: Premium differences of several hundred francs per year are not uncommon.
health.why2: Basic insurance offers the same benefits everywhere – only the price varies.
health.why3: Supplementary insurance coverage and premiums differ considerably between providers.
health.why4: Switching is straightforward and without any interruption in coverage.
health.basicDesc: Same benefits, different premiums. We show you where you can save.
health.suppTitle: Supplementary insurance – more protection, more comfort
health.suppDesc: Enhance your basic insurance with tailored supplementary benefits.
health.ctaDesc: Contact us for a free and non-binding initial consultation. Together, we will find the optimal solution for your insurance needs.

basicInsurance.heroSub: Same benefits, different premiums. We show you where you can save.
basicInsurance.intro: Mandatory basic insurance (OKP) under KVG covers basic healthcare in Switzerland. All insurers offer the same benefits catalog – yet premiums vary considerably depending on the insurer, deductible, and insurance model.
basicInsurance.feat1Desc: The benefits catalog is prescribed by law. You can switch to a cheaper insurer without any loss of coverage.
basicInsurance.feat2Desc: From CHF 300 to CHF 2,500 – the higher the deductible, the lower the premium. We calculate which model works best for you.
basicInsurance.feat3Desc: Family doctor, HMO, or telemedicine models offer additional premium discounts. We explain the differences.
basicInsurance.feat4Desc: You can switch your basic insurance every year by the end of November. We support you throughout the entire process.
basicInsurance.offer1: Personal premium comparison based on your location and situation
basicInsurance.offer2: Advice on the optimal deductible model
basicInsurance.relatedSuppTitle: Supplementary insurance – more protection, more comfort
basicInsurance.relatedSuppDesc: Enhance your basic insurance with tailored supplementary benefits.

suppInsurance.heroTitle: Supplementary insurance – more protection, more comfort
suppInsurance.heroSub: Enhance your basic insurance with tailored supplementary benefits.
suppInsurance.intro: While basic insurance covers standard care, supplementary insurance gives you access to enhanced services: private or semi-private hospital ward, alternative medicine, dental care, glasses, and more. Benefits and premiums vary greatly between providers.
suppInsurance.feat1Desc: Choose your doctor freely, private or semi-private ward – across Switzerland or worldwide.
suppInsurance.feat2Desc: Alternative medicine, glasses, contacts, preventive examinations, and dental hygiene.
suppInsurance.feat3Desc: Orthodontics, fillings, crowns – dental costs are not covered by basic insurance.
suppInsurance.feat4Desc: Emergency transport, repatriation, and medical costs abroad.
suppInsurance.offer1: Independent comparison of supplementary insurance providers
suppInsurance.offer2: Clear breakdown of benefits and costs
suppInsurance.offer3: Advice on the right combination for your life situation

pension.heroTitle: Pension planning – securing your financial future
pension.heroSub: From tax optimization to protecting your family: we plan your pension together.
pension.intro: The Swiss pension system is based on three pillars. Private pension provision (3rd pillar) offers you the opportunity to save on taxes while building wealth for the future. We show you which solutions fit your life situation.
pension.whyTitle: Why is private pension planning important?
pension.why1: AHV and occupational pensions cover only about 60% of your last income in retirement.
pension.why3: Early planning maximizes your wealth accumulation through compound interest.
pension.why4: Risk coverage protects your family in case of disability or death.
pension.p3aTitle: Pillar 3a – save taxes, secure your future
pension.p3aDesc: Restricted pension is one of the most effective tax optimization instruments in Switzerland.
pension.p3bDesc: Unrestricted pension complements your restricted pension with maximum freedom.
pension.lifeDesc: Combine savings and risk protection in a single solution.
pension.riskDesc: Protect your loved ones financially in case of death or disability.
pension.kidsTitle: Children's plans – a secure future for your children
pension.kidsDesc: Pension, protection, and education capital – so your children are optimally covered.
pension.vestedTitle: Vested benefits accounts – safeguard your pension capital
pension.vestedDesc: When changing jobs or taking a career break, your pension fund assets need to be protected and optimally invested.
pension.retirementTitle: Pension consulting – plan your retirement right
pension.retirementDesc: Early and comprehensive retirement planning ensures you can maintain your standard of living in old age.

property.heroSub: From auto insurance to legal protection: we find the optimal coverage for your everyday life.
property.intro: Property insurance protects your belongings and financial security in everyday life. Premiums and benefits differ considerably between providers. We compare on your behalf and ensure you are optimally insured – without unnecessary double coverage.
property.why1: Premium differences of up to 50% for comparable benefits.
property.why2: Bundle discounts when holding multiple policies with the same provider.
property.why3: Avoiding double insurance and coverage gaps.
property.why4: Regular reviews save money in the long run.
property.autoTitle: Auto insurance – optimally insured on the road
property.autoDesc: Liability, partial, or comprehensive: we find the right coverage for your vehicle.
property.householdDesc: Protection for your furniture and personal belongings against fire, water, and theft.
property.liabilityTitle: Liability insurance – protection in everyday life
property.liabilityDesc: A moment of carelessness can be expensive. Liability insurance protects you from financial consequences.
property.legalTitle: Legal protection insurance – enforce your rights
property.legalDesc: Legal disputes are expensive. Legal protection insurance covers lawyer and court costs.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We take the protection of your personal data seriously. This privacy policy informs you about how we handle your data.
privacy.responsibleText: Solidwave Group AG, Zug, Switzerland. Email: service@solidwave.ch
privacy.dataText: We only collect data that you voluntarily provide to us via the contact form: name, email address, phone number (optional), and your message.
privacy.purposeText: Your data is used exclusively for processing your inquiry and responding to you. We do not share your data with third parties unless required by law.
privacy.storageText: Your data is transmitted securely via the Resend API and stored only for as long as necessary to process your inquiry.
privacy.rightsText: You have the right to access, correct, delete, and restrict the processing of your personal data. Please contact us at service@solidwave.ch.
privacy.cookiesText: This website does not currently use tracking cookies or analytics tools.

terms.contentText: All content on this website is for informational purposes only. It does not constitute legal, financial, or insurance advice. For personal advice, please contact us directly.
terms.liabilityText: We are not liable for the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of information on this website. Use is at your own risk.

vag45.title: Transparency under ISA Art. 45
vag45.legalText: Under Art. 45 of the Federal Act on the Supervision of Insurance Companies (Insurance Supervision Act, ISA), insurance intermediaries are required to inform their clients about the nature and extent of their compensation.
vag45.statusText: Solidwave Group AG is registered with FINMA as an independent insurance intermediary. As an independent broker, we are not tied to any particular insurance company and act exclusively in the interests of our clients.
vag45.compensationText:
Our services – advice, comparison, and brokerage of insurance products – are free of charge for our clients. We finance ourselves through brokerage commissions (courtages) paid to us by insurance companies for the placement of insurance contracts.

Brokerage commissions are part of the regular premium structure of insurance companies. Whether you take out insurance directly or through us has no impact on your premium amount.

The amount of commission varies depending on the insurance product and company. Upon request, we are happy to inform you about the specific compensation for a particular product.
vag45.conflictsText: We are committed to disclosing any conflicts of interest. Our recommendations are based on your individual needs and not on the amount of compensation. Should a conflict of interest exist, we will inform you in advance.
vag45.rightsText: You have the right at any time to request detailed information about our compensation for a specific insurance product. Please contact us at service@solidwave.ch.

cta.readyDesc: Contact us for a free and non-binding initial consultation. Together, we will find the optimal solution for your insurance needs.
